data.content: Shipment review approved. Confirmed: (a) Merge commit b0885338 is HEAD of origin/main. (b) All four quality gates pass on origin/main: lint clean, tsc clean, 313 test files / 3122 tests pass, build succeeds. (c) Acceptance grep verified zero hits: normalizeAgentIdentity/normalize.*Model in src/app/, toActiveAgentInfo anywhere in src/. Closing knot.
